headline: Americans Need $1.6 Million to Retire. The Median 55-Year-Old Has $205,341.
summary: Charles Schwab’s (NYSE:SCHW) most recent 401(k) Participant Survey put the retirement ‘magic number’ at $1.6 million in 2025, down from $1.8 million in 2024. For years, Americans have given pollsters some version of that same answer. The number is meant to represent a comfortable retirement: enough to cover housing, healthcare, travel, and the gap left ... Americans Need $1.6 Million to Retire. The Median 55-Year-Old Has $205,341.
